expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: The output notes the focus but states it cannot be demonstrated: "No provided artifacts show a 'defect feedback loop' implementation that injects defect-derived scenarios into a subsequent QA plan" and "there is no allowable claim ... that the orchestrator would transform those defects into QA-plan scenarios".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
